title: Reproductive rights key issue in election
shortDescription: Both sides of the aisle are saying abortion is a key issue heading into the November 2024 election.

title: Trump Georgia election case temporarily halted | The Excerpt

title: Donald Trump focuses on the damage of addictions in Hunter Biden trial
shortDescription: Asked about Hunter Biden's trial on gun charges, Donald Trump talked about ravages of people such as his own brother suffering addiction.

title: Biden said U.S. weapons would not be used to strike Moscow, Kremlin
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said in an interview Thursday that U.S. weapons would not be used to strike Moscow and the Kremlin.

title: 'You want to know the price of freedom?' Biden honors D-Day, WWII vets
shortDescription: From the hallowed ground where many of their comrades rest beneath French soil, WWII veterans accompanied by President Joe Biden commemorate D-Day.

title: President Joe Biden's trip to France for D-Day
shortDescription: President Biden and other world leaders honored WWII veterans on the 80th D-Day anniversary in France.

title: Hallie Biden describes throwing away Hunter Biden's gun: Updates
shortDescription: Hallie Biden, who Hunter dated in the aftermath of his brother's death, was granted immunity for her own drug use in exchange for her testimony.

title: Abortion is protected in their state, will it decide their vote?
shortDescription: Here are voters’ stories on whether the state of abortion in their state is sending them to the polls.

title: Biden family holds tight amid tales of Hunter's drug addiction, shame
shortDescription: It has been a full court press of Biden family members in the front row over the first three days of Hunter Biden's felony gun trial in federal court.

title: Did Trump's guilty verdict drive away voters? Here's what early polls say
shortDescription: So far, at least, a smallish number may change their minds because of Trump's conviction - but they could wield a decisive impact.

title: Marco Rubio MAGA makeover helps senator land on Trump VP short list
shortDescription: Once the darling of the GOP establishment, Rubio has adopted Trump's views on immigration, Ukraine and the election as he competes to join the ticket.

title: Georgia appeals court halts 2020 election case
shortDescription: The Georgia Court of Appeals temporarily halted the 2020 election case while an appeal to disqualify Fulton DA Fani Willis is resolved.

title: NYPD expected to revoke Trump's gun license after conviction: reports
shortDescription: The former president's legal team has yet to comment on whether or not NYPD will rescind Trump's gun license.

shortDescription: Curtis Jackson, rapper and owner of Sire Spirits, urged members of Congress to push for legislative change to support minority entrepreneurs.

shortDescription: Hunter Biden's ex-wife and former girlfriend were the first witnesses near to the president's son to testify in his ongoing gun trial Wednesday.

title: Colorado GOP calls for burning of Pride flags
shortDescription: "Burn all the #pride flags this June," the Colorado Republican Party wrote in a social media post this week.

title: Trump claims statute of limitations violated in fraud case. Here's why
shortDescription: Trump and his team have said the statute of limitations may be an issue in appealing his convictions. Here's what we know about the unusual timing.

title: Trump expected at GOP convention despite July 11 sentencing: RNC chief
shortDescription: Trump's sentencing in a New York hush money case is scheduled for four days before the Republican National Convention begins in Milwaukee.

title: Hunter Biden's addiction memoir is popular in court - and on Amazon
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's "Beautiful Things," peaked at #4 on Amazon in April 2021, before falling into a deep trough. Now it's surging.

title: Political fallout, upshot in wake of the Trump verdict | The Excerpt
shortDescription: While Trump’s support is holding at around 31%, about half of Americans feel the guilty verdict was correct. More on a special episode of The Excerpt.
